_template: Parent-skill mode-registry.json scaffold. Replace every [bracketed] placeholder. This file is the single source of truth for the discriminator + advisorRouting; routers/commands/tests READ it and none re-derive the mapping. The advisor keeps its hardcoded projection maps in sync via a CI drift-guard test (maps == registry projection); it does NOT read this file at runtime. See sk-doc/references/skill_creation.md section 10.
description: [Declarative mode registry: the discriminator (workflowMode/runtimeLoopType/backendKind) PLUS the advisorRouting projection for [parent-skill-name]. Hardcoded projection maps stay in sync via a CI drift-guard test; the advisor does not read this file at runtime.]

discriminator.workflowMode: Public command/advisor/mode key. Stable identity used in commands, advisor aliases, and this registry. Carried by every mode.
discriminator.runtimeLoopType: The backend convergence loop key consumed by [backend]'s convergence step. Validated against the allowed set. Explicit null for non-loop (host/adapter) modes; NEVER inferred from workflowMode.
discriminator.backendKind: Which backend actually runs the mode: [runtime-loop-type | improvement-host | external-adapter | ...].

advisorRoutingContract.routingClass: How the advisor finds the mode. 'lexical' = weighted-regex scoring in skill_advisor.py AND present in both projection maps. 'alias-fold' = TS projection map only (an alias projection, not lexically scored). 'metadata' = resolved by skill membership; no advisor map entry. 'command-bridge' = routed by its command, not an advisor map entry.
advisorRoutingContract.legacyAdvisorId: The legacy skill id the projection maps key on (present for lexical + alias-fold modes only).
advisorRoutingContract.advisorDefaultMode: Marks the default mode a multi-mode legacy id folds to. Never inferred from array order.
advisorRoutingContract.legacyAliases: The advisor's SYSTEM-ID alias set (not the natural-language aliases[] phrases); the drift-guard asserts these match order-insensitively.
advisorRoutingContract.packetSkillName: The packet's SKILL.md name. Standard for new parent skills: folder == packetSkillName == deep-<mode>. Grandfather any mismatch here.
advisorRoutingContract.driftGuard: [path to the vitest that asserts the hardcoded Python + TS maps equal this registry's projection].

modes._example: routingClass 'lexical' — weighted-regex scored AND in both projection maps.
routingClass 'alias-fold' — a multi-mode legacy id folding to its default mode via advisorDefaultMode; projected in TS only, not lexically scored.
routingClass 'metadata' — resolved by skill membership; no advisor map entry of its own (no legacyAdvisorId).
routingClass 'command-bridge' — routed by its command, not by an advisor map entry (no legacyAdvisorId).
